violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Need to wash hands between glove changes. Sink was dry upon entrance.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Sprayer had no bleach.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -No paper towels at handwash station.
Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. -Hot dogs at 127F.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Employee doing glove change without a handwash.
